objective: Determine whether placing the retained LFM2.5-VL MLX model files in LM Studio's user model store is sufficient to unblock live LM Studio validation.
summary: A complete copy under ~/.lmstudio/models did not make the retained VLM visible to `lms ls --json`, and bounded `lms load` attempts by model key, copied directory path, and copied model.safetensors path all failed with `Model not found`. Live LM Studio validation remains blocked before inference.

observations.lms_ls_json: Only text-embedding-nomic-embed-text-v1.5 was listed; lmstudio-community/LFM2.5-VL-1.6B-MLX-8bit was absent.
observations.model_data_json: Contains lmstudio-community/LFM2.5-VL-1.6B-MLX-8bit as a Hugging Face source entry, but that metadata alone does not make the model loadable.
observations.model_index_cache: The current cache listed the bundled embedding model only; no badModels or direct LFM2.5-VL entry explained a loadable model.
observations.hub_layout: ~/.lmstudio/hub/models contains virtual model metadata directories, not a concrete downloaded LFM2.5-VL MLX weight directory.

repo_changes: Updated scripts/lmstudio_vlm_live_validation_preflight.py to report the LM Studio user model-store directory as informational diagnostics.
Updated README.md to state that copying files into ~/.lmstudio/models is not a supported readiness signal unless `lms ls --json` exposes the key.

final_runtime_state_expected.copied_model_dir: removed after this artifact is written

next_supported_action: Rerun `lms get https://huggingface.co/lmstudio-community/LFM2.5-VL-1.6B-MLX-8bit --mlx -y` when the LM Studio download path can make progress, then rerun the preflight. Do not hand-edit LM Studio model-index cache files.
